win_condition: When the personality card deck is exhausted, finish round and perform final god-card scoring; highest VP wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most cash wins; if still tied, tied player with most goods wins, then share victory.

categories.label: Jupiter Cards
categories.description: Score per Jupiter cards based on brick and food-producing cities.

categories.label: Saturnus Cards
categories.description: Score per Saturnus cards based on number of provinces settled.

categories.label: Mars Cards
categories.description: Score per Mars cards based on colonists.

categories.label: Mercurius Cards
categories.description: Score per Mercurius cards based on different goods types produced.

categories.label: Minerva Cards
categories.description: Score per Minerva specialist multipliers and matching city types.

categories.label: Vesta Cards
categories.description: Score from Vesta cards based on cash at game end.
